name: control_playback
description: Start, pause, skip, or seek playback on the user's active Spotify device. Transfer playback between devices.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The ID of the device to target. If omitted, targets the user's currently active device.

parameters.name: context_uri
parameters.description: Spotify URI of the context to play (album, artist, or playlist).

parameters.name: uris
parameters.description: Array of Spotify track URIs to play. Cannot be used with context_uri.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Where in the context to start playback. Use 'position' for index or 'uri' for a specific track.

parameters.name: position_ms
parameters.description: Position in milliseconds to seek to in the track.
